THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.description: At the end of combat, lose HP equal to your Burden. If this would kill you, survive at 1 HP and lose Max HP equal to the excess.
THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of combat, lose #b{0} HP. If this would kill you, survive at 1 HP and lose Max HP equal to the excess.
THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.title: Burden
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.descrip: Whenever you gain Burden, deal 2 damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you gain Burden, deal #b{0} damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.title: Grim Certainty
THEPENITENT-FAITH_POWER.description: Faith prevents damage equal to its amount. This persists between turns. At the start of your turn, lose half of your Faith.
THEPENITENT-FAITH_POWER.title: Faith
